scenarios.title: Random Baseline
scenarios.hypothesis: Memoryless agents should produce a noisy cloud near the unbiased attendance level.

scenarios.title: Threshold Optimists
scenarios.hypothesis: Lenient threshold rules should create a stubborn high-attendance plateau with frequent overcrowding.

scenarios.title: Moving Average Echo
scenarios.hypothesis: Short-memory feedback should create a near period-2 sawtooth between crowded and empty rounds.

scenarios.title: Moving Average Long Memory
scenarios.hypothesis: Longer windows should smooth the response and create broad, lagged waves instead of a sharp alternation.

scenarios.title: Adaptive Fast
scenarios.hypothesis: Fast threshold updates should overreact and create large self-inflicted oscillations.

scenarios.title: Adaptive Slow
scenarios.hypothesis: Slow adaptation should spend longer drifting before settling into a narrower band.

scenarios.title: Contrarian Flash Mob
scenarios.hypothesis: When everyone goes only after recent crowding, the crowd should move in delayed synchronized bursts.

scenarios.title: Trend Follower Whiplash
scenarios.hypothesis: Trend extrapolation should amplify moves and produce boom-bust waves with sharp reversals.

scenarios.title: Loyal Square Wave
scenarios.hypothesis: Synchronized fixed schedules should generate a clean on-off attendance block pattern.

scenarios.title: Regret Balancer
scenarios.hypothesis: Regret updates should drive an exploratory start and then hover in a self-correcting middle band.

scenarios.title: Mixed Ecology
scenarios.hypothesis: Strategy diversity should break synchronization and pull the system toward a richer but safer corridor.

scenarios.title: Custom Trend Guard
scenarios.hypothesis: A hand-coded recent-average guard should create conservative bursts with quick pullbacks near capacity.

groups.name: Custom Trend Guard
